name: suede_midi
description: Suede Labs MIDI transcription for producers, composers, music educators, transcribers, music notation publishers, plugin developers, music theory analysts, and agents building score-aware AI music pipelines. Converts an audio recording into a MIDI file with detected notes, velocities, timing, and per-instrument tracks where possible. Supports DAW import for remix and reproduction, sheet-music generation pipelines, music education and ear-training tools, sample tagging and metadata enrichment, ML training data for symbolic music models, and paid x402/ACP agent commerce.

audio_url.description: Public HTTP(S) URL of the source audio file. Supports mp3, wav, flac, m4a, and ogg up to 10 minutes long.

instrument.description: Restrict transcription to a single instrument family, or auto to transcribe everything detected.

quantize.description: Optional grid quantization for note start times. Use 'none' to preserve performed micro-timing.
